scripts.generate: npm run build --silent && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js generate
scripts.layout:init: npm run build --silent && node dist/apps/cli/src/index.js layout:init
scripts.test:routing-v2: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice1: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 1"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice2: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 2"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice3: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 3"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice4a: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 4a"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice4b: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 4b"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice5a: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 5a"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice5b: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "routing v2 slice 5b"
scripts.test:routing-v2:slice5: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js cli
scripts.test:cli: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js cli
scripts.test:web: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "web pipeline"
scripts.test:legacy-layout: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "stereotype grid layout"
scripts.test:drawio: npm run build --silent && node dist/tests/run-tests.js "drawio exporter" "mxGraph model"
